verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus, All Glorious Prepare in us Your temple We're called as living stones Where You're enthroned

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And as You rose from death in power So rise within our worship Rise upon our praise And let the hands that saw You raised Clothe us in Your glory And draw us by Your grace

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh the glory Of Your Presence We Your temple Give You reverence

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So arise to Your rest And be blessed by our praise And as we glory in Your embrace And as Your presence Now fills this place
